studyName: Metabolomics of Coronary Heart Disease (CHD) in the WHI

tables.description: Baseline metabolomic profiles were measured in case/control pairs in the hormone trials (HT) and WHI_OS.
Repeated measures at one year were available for case and controls in the hormone trials (HT).
The Metabolomics of CHD in WHI subject phenotype table includes the status of incident coronary heart disease (CHD).
